name: Mini UPS Battery Backup, 36W 5V/9V/12V 2A Compact Uninterruptible Power Supply for Router, Camera, and Network Devices
shortName: Mini UPS Battery Backup, 36W 5V/9V/12V 2A Compact Uninterruptible
description: A 36W compact mini UPS with multi-voltage output for backup power to routers, cameras, and network devices.
